summary: Comprehensive E2E Testing - Iteration 8 COMPLETE. 34/34 backend tests PASS. Frontend UI verified working. All major flows tested including Search, Local Communities, Comment Threading, Admin Panel, and Core Features.

issues: expo-notifications web support warning (expected for web)

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Search Frikts - GET /api/problems?search=xxx returns results correctly
✓ Search People - GET /api/users/search?q=xxx returns user results
✓ Search Communities - GET /api/communities?search=xxx returns filtered communities
✓ Join Community - POST /api/communities/join with invite code works (case-insensitive)
✓ Local Frikt Posting - POST /api/problems with is_local=true creates local frikt with community_id
✓ Local Feed - GET /api/problems?feed=local&community_id=xxx returns only local frikts
✓ Global Feed Exclusion - GET /api/problems?feed=new/trending/foryou excludes local frikts (is_local != true)
✓ Search Includes Local - GET /api/problems?search=xxx includes local frikts (is_local filter skipped)
✓ Switch Community - POST /api/communities/switch returns 200 with new community
✓ Leave Community - DELETE /api/communities/leave works correctly
✓ Request Join - POST /api/communities/{id}/request-join submits join request
✓ Request New Community - POST /api/community-requests submits creation request
✓ Admin Join Requests - GET /api/admin/communities/{id}/join-requests filtered by expires_at
✓ Admin Community Requests - GET /api/admin/community-requests filtered by expires_at
✓ Comment Threading - POST /api/comments with parent_comment_id creates nested reply
✓ Nested Reply Flattening - Replies to replies are flattened to top-level parent
✓ Soft Delete - Comments with replies show [deleted] placeholder (status=removed)
✓ Reply to Removed - Can reply to status=removed comments (only status=hidden blocks)
✓ Admin Create Community - POST /api/admin/communities works
✓ Admin Change Code - PUT /api/admin/communities/{id}/code works
✓ Admin Export - GET /api/admin/communities/{id}/export returns anonymous format (FRIKT: {text}, RELATES: {count} | DATE: {date} | COMMENTS: {count})
✓ Categories - GET /api/categories includes 'local' category
✓ Relate - POST /api/problems/{id}/relate works
✓ Helpful - POST /api/comments/{id}/helpful works
✓ Follow/Unfollow Category - POST/DELETE /api/categories/{id}/follow works
✓ User Profile - GET /api/users/{id}/profile returns profile data
✓ Notifications - GET /api/notifications returns {notifications: [], unread_count: N}
✓ Badges - GET /api/badges/definitions returns badge definitions
✓ Mission - GET /api/mission returns daily mission with theme and prompt
seed_data_creation: Test communities created during tests with prefixes: JOIN-, LOCF-, SW1-, SW2-, LV-, ADM-, CHG-. These can be cleaned up via admin panel.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 28 requested features verified working. Key verifications: 1) Search works across Frikts/People/Communities tabs, 2) Local Communities feature fully functional (join, post, feed filtering, switch, leave, request), 3) Comment threading with flattening works, 4) Soft delete preserves thread structure, 5) Admin panel community management works, 6) Export format is anonymous. Frontend is React Native (Expo) running in web mode - login form uses get_by_text selector for Sign In button.

features_verified.search_includes_local: PASS - search param skips is_local filter
features_verified.nested_reply_flattening: PASS - Replies to replies flatten to top-level
features_verified.reply_to_removed_comment: PASS - Can reply to status=removed (not hidden)

frontend_verification.login_page: PASS - Clean design with email/password fields and Sign In button
frontend_verification.home_page: PASS - Global/Local toggle, Today's Theme, For You/Trending/New tabs, Latest frikts
frontend_verification.local_feed_ui: PASS - Shows 'Join a local community' prompt with code input, Join button, Browse Communities
frontend_verification.search_page: PASS - Frikts/Users/Communities tabs with search input
frontend_verification.navigation: PASS - Bottom nav: Home, Categories, +, Search, Profile
